ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "handicap_index" REAL /* Golf handicap index of the player */,
  "membership_status" TEXT /* Membership status (e.g., member, guest) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the player */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the player joined the system */,
  "last_played" TEXT /* Date of the last round played by the player */,
  "preferred_courses" TEXT /* List of preferred courses */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the player (e.g., player, manager, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the golf course */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the golf course */,
  "number_of_holes" INTEGER /* Total number of holes in the course */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the course was established */,
  "total_par" INTEGER /* Total par for the course */,
  "course_length" INTEGER /* Total length of the course in yards or meters */,
  "green_fee" REAL /* Green fee for a round of golf */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the golf course */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the golf course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "holes" (
  "hole_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hole */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course that contains the hole */,
  "hole_number" INTEGER /* Number of the hole in the course */,
  "par" INTEGER /* Par value of the hole */,
  "handicap" INTEGER /* Handicap index for the hole */,
  "hole_length" INTEGER /* Length of the hole in yards or meters */,
  "tee_boxes" TEXT /* Information about different tee boxes (e.g., blue, white, red) */,
  "difficulty_rating" INTEGER /* Difficulty rating of the hole */,
  "last_maintained" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance activity for the hole */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hole_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_holes_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rounds" (
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each round */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who played the round */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course where the round was played */,
  "date_played" TEXT /* Date when the round was played */,
  "total_score_gross" INTEGER /* Total score without handicap adjustments */,
  "total_score_net" INTEGER /* Total score with handicap adjustments */,
  "tee_box" TEXT /* Tee box used for the round */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the round */,
  "course_conditions" TEXT /* Course conditions during the round */,
  "round_type" TEXT /* Type of round (e.g., practice, tournament) */,
  "round_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the round */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the round */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rounds_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rounds_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the round that contains the score */,
  "hole_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hole for which the score is recorded */,
  "gross_score" INTEGER /* Score without handicap adjustments */,
  "net_score" INTEGER /* Score with handicap adjustments */,
  "putts" INTEGER /* Number of putts for the hole */,
  "fairway_hit" INTEGER /* Whether the fairway was hit (boolean) */,
  "green_in_regulation" INTEGER /* Whether the green was hit in regulation (boolean) */,
  "penalties" INTEGER /* Penalties incurred during the hole */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_hole_id FOREIGN KEY ("hole_id") REFERENCES holes ("hole_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_round_id FOREIGN KEY ("round_id") REFERENCES rounds ("round_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tee_times" (
  "tee_time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tee time */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course where the tee time is booked */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who booked the tee time */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the tee time */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the tee time */,
  "booking_status" TEXT /* Status of the booking (e.g., confirmed, pending) */,
  "group_size" INTEGER /* Number of players in the group */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status (e.g., paid, unpaid) */,
  "cancellation_status" TEXT /* Cancellation status (e.g., canceled, not canceled) */,
  "cancellation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for cancellation if applicable */,
  "confirmed_by" TEXT /* Who confirmed the tee time (e.g., player, manager) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tee_time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tee_times_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tee_times_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition report */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course for which the conditions are reported */,
  "date_reported" TEXT /* Date when the conditions were reported */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions on the date reported */,
  "course_conditions" TEXT /* Overall conditions of the course */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Maintenance status of the course */,
  "temperature" INTEGER /* Temperature on the date reported */,
  "humidity" INTEGER /* Humidity on the date reported */,
  "wind_speed" INTEGER /* Wind speed on the date reported */,
  "maintenance_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the maintenance activities */,
  "player_feedback" TEXT /* Feedback from players about the course conditions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_conditions_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course where the event is held */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the event */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., tournament, fundraiser) */,
  "registration_fee" REAL /* Registration fee for the event */,
  "maximum_participants" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants allowed */,
  "registration_status" TEXT /* Registration status (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "event_organizer" TEXT /* Name of the event organizer */,
  "sponsors" TEXT /* List of event sponsors */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)
